GB/T 17262, Single-capped fluorescent lamps‰∏ÄPerformance specification
GB/T 17263 ,Self ballasted lamps for general lighting service‰∏ÄPerformance requirements
GB/T 21091, Sefballasted electrodeless fluorescent lamps for general Jighting services‰∏ÄPerform-
ance requirements
GB/T 34841, Fluorescent induction /lamps‰∏ÄPerformance specification
3 Terms and definitions
For the purpose of this document, the terms and definitions given in GB/T 10682, GB/T 17262Ôºå
GB/T 17263,GB/T 21091,GB/T 34841 and the following apply.
3.1
luminous efficacy of fluorescent lamps
ratio of the initial Iuminous flux to the input power of fluorescent lamps under the specified testing
conditions
NOTE ‚ÄùThe luminous efficacy of a fluorescent lamp is expressed in Im/wW.
3.2
minimum allowable value of energy efficiency for fluorescent lamps
the minimum allowable value of Iluminous efficacy of fluorescent lamps under the specified testing
conditions
4 Technical requirements
4.1 Energy efficiency grades
4.1.1 The energy efficiency levels of fluorescent lamps are classified into three grades, of which
Grade 1 is the most efficient.
4.1.2 The Iluminous efficacy of self-ballasted fluorescent lamps of each grade shall not be less than
respective values specified in Table 1.
2
